plugins.name: apple-events
plugins.description: Native macOS Reminders and Calendar integration via EventKit (FradSer/mcp-server-apple-events). npx-launched; macOS + Node 18+ + Xcode CLT required.

plugins.name: basedpyright-lsp
plugins.description: Basedpyright Python language server (stricter pyright fork). uvx / pipx run fallback.

plugins.name: bash-lsp
plugins.description: bash-language-server for shell scripts. bunx / pnpm dlx / npx fallback. Integrates with shellcheck when present on PATH.

plugins.name: biome-formatter
plugins.description: Auto-format JS / TS / JSON with Biome after Claude writes them. Monolith PostToolUse hook; bunx / pnpm dlx / npx fallback.

plugins.name: biome-js-formatter
plugins.description: Auto-format JS / TS only with Biome after Claude writes them. PostToolUse hook; bunx / pnpm dlx / npx fallback.

plugins.name: biome-json-formatter
plugins.description: Auto-format JSON / JSONC only with Biome after Claude writes them. PostToolUse hook; bunx / pnpm dlx / npx fallback.

plugins.name: biome-lsp
plugins.description: Biome language server (lsp-proxy) for JS / TS / JSX / TSX / JSON / JSONC / CSS / GraphQL. bunx / pnpm dlx / npx fallback.

plugins.name: browseros
plugins.description: BrowserOS MCP server for driving the local BrowserOS agentic browser. Local streamable-HTTP transport; BrowserOS must be running with its MCP server enabled.

plugins.name: context7
plugins.description: Upstash Context7 MCP server for up-to-date documentation lookup. Remote streamable-HTTP transport at mcp.context7.com — no local runtime, no auth required for the free tier.

plugins.name: deepwiki
plugins.description: Devin DeepWiki MCP server for AI-grounded Q&A over any public GitHub repository's wiki. Remote HTTP transport, no auth.

plugins.name: prettier-css-formatter
plugins.description: Auto-format CSS / SCSS / Less with Prettier after Claude writes them. PostToolUse hook; bunx / pnpm dlx / npx fallback.

plugins.name: prettier-formatter
plugins.description: Auto-format JS / TS / JSON / CSS / HTML / Markdown / YAML with Prettier after Claude writes them. Monolith PostToolUse hook; bunx / pnpm dlx / npx fallback.

plugins.name: prettier-html-formatter
plugins.description: Auto-format HTML with Prettier after Claude writes them. PostToolUse hook; bunx / pnpm dlx / npx fallback.

plugins.name: prettier-js-formatter
plugins.description: Auto-format JS / TS with Prettier after Claude writes them. PostToolUse hook; bunx / pnpm dlx / npx fallback.

plugins.name: prettier-json-formatter
plugins.description: Auto-format JSON / JSON5 / JSONC with Prettier after Claude writes them. PostToolUse hook; bunx / pnpm dlx / npx fallback.

plugins.name: prettier-markdown-formatter
plugins.description: Auto-format Markdown / MDX with Prettier after Claude writes them. PostToolUse hook; bunx / pnpm dlx / npx fallback.

plugins.name: prettier-yaml-formatter
plugins.description: Auto-format YAML with Prettier after Claude writes them. PostToolUse hook; bunx / pnpm dlx / npx fallback.

plugins.name: pyright-lsp
plugins.description: Microsoft Pyright Python language server. Routed through the JS/TS chain because pyright is npm-first.

plugins.name: ruff-formatter
plugins.description: Auto-format Python files with ruff after Claude writes them. PostToolUse hook; uvx / pipx run fallback.

plugins.name: tombi-lsp
plugins.description: Tombi TOML language server (schema-aware; Helix uses it by default). uvx / pipx run fallback.

plugins.name: ty-lsp
plugins.description: Astral ty (Rust-based Python type checker) as an LSP. BETA — pre-1.0, breaking changes ship between patch releases.

plugins.name: typescript-lsp
plugins.description: typescript-language-server for TypeScript / JavaScript. bunx / pnpm dlx / npx fallback, pulls the typescript peer dep fresh.

plugins.name: vscode-css-lsp
plugins.description: VS Code CSS / SCSS / Less language server (from vscode-langservers-extracted). bunx / pnpm dlx / npx fallback.

plugins.name: vscode-html-lsp
plugins.description: VS Code HTML language server (from vscode-langservers-extracted). bunx / pnpm dlx / npx fallback.

plugins.name: vscode-json-lsp
plugins.description: VS Code JSON / JSONC language server (from vscode-langservers-extracted). bunx / pnpm dlx / npx fallback. Overlaps biome-lsp on .json/.jsonc.

plugins.name: yaml-lsp
plugins.description: yaml-language-server with built-in schema catalog (GitHub Actions, Kubernetes, docker-compose). bunx / pnpm dlx / npx fallback.

plugins.name: tokscale-auto-submit
plugins.description: Auto-submit tokscale usage stats (Claude Code + Codex CLI) on every SessionStart and SessionEnd. Detached via nohup so the session never waits on it.
